dexMoveCache.Ice Punch: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.
dexMoveCache.Drain Punch: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
dexMoveCache.Zen Headbutt: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.
dexMoveCache.Hidden Power (Ground): Power and type depend upon user’s IVs. Power can range from 30 to 70.
dexMoveCache.Inferno: Has a 100% chance to burn the target.
dexMoveCache.Snarl: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
